parameters.query: SELECT * FROM v_churn_alerts ORDER BY churn_probability DESC;

INSERT INTO interventions (account_id, csm_id, trigger_risk_tier, trigger_arr, strategy, status)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.account_id }}',
  {{ $json.csm_id ? "'" + $json.csm_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.risk_tier }}',
  {{ $json.annual_revenue }},
  '{{ $json.strategy }}',
  'Active'
)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO outreach_messages (intervention_id, account_id, channel, subject, body_html, recipient_email, status, sent_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.intervention_id }}',
  '{{ $json.account_id }}',
  'Email',
  '{{ $json.emailSubject }}',
  '{{ $json.emailBody }}',
  '{{ $json.account_email }}',
  'Sent',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO tasks (intervention_id, account_id, assigned_to, title, description, priority, status, due_date)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.intervention_id }}',
  '{{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.account_id }}',
  {{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.csm_id ? "'" + $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.csm_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.taskTitle }}',
  '{{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.taskDescription }}',
  '{{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.taskPriority }}',
  'Open',
  NOW() + INTERVAL '3 days'
);
UPDATE accounts SET intervention_status = 'Active' WHERE id = '{{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.account_id }}';

INSERT INTO cases (intervention_id, account_id, assigned_to, title, description, priority, status, escalated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.intervention_id }}',
  '{{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.account_id }}',
  {{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.csm_id ? "'" + $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.csm_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  'Critical churn risk: {{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.account_name }} (ARR €{{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.annual_revenue }})',
  '{{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.taskDescription }}',
  'Critical',
  'Open',
  NOW()
);

parameters.subject: =🚨 CSM Escalation: {{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.account_name }} — Critical Risk (ARR €{{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.annual_revenue }})
parameters.html:
=

Critical Account Escalation

Account: {{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.account_name }}

ARR: €{{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.annual_revenue }}

Churn Probability: {{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.churn_probability }}

Risk Tier: {{ $('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.risk_tier }}

Top Churn Drivers: {{ JSON.stringify($('Merge Intervention ID').item.json.churn_drivers) }}

An outreach email has already been sent to the customer. Please follow up within 24 hours.
